products.title: Ubtan Soap
products.description: An authentic blend of traditional herbs, chickpea flour, and turmeric. Gently exfoliates and brings back your skin's natural golden glow, echoing age-old bathing rituals.
products.ingredients: Chickpea Flour (Besan), Wild Turmeric (Kasturi Manjal), Sandalwood Powder, Saffron Extracts, Almond Oil, Virgin Coconut Oil.
products.benefits: Deeply cleanses, removes tan, brightens skin tone, and gently exfoliates dead skin cells for a radiant finish.

products.title: Pure Turmeric Soap
products.description: Infused with therapeutic turmeric extracts to deeply purify and heal your skin. Its anti-inflammatory properties soothe irritation while leaving a warm, healthy radiance.
products.ingredients: Organic Turmeric Root Extract, Turmeric Essential Oil, Neem Oil, Pure Glycerin, Castor Oil.
products.benefits: Antibacterial protection, reduces blemishes, helps clear acne scars, and evens out skin discoloration.

products.title: Pure Turmeric & Besan Soap
products.description: A perfect double-action Ayurvedic bar combining the skin-firming properties of besan with the protective qualities of turmeric. Exfoliates while nourishing.
products.ingredients: Turmeric Powder, Bengal Gram Flour (Besan), Sweet Almond Oil, Sesame Oil, Vetiver Essential Oil.
products.benefits: Controls excess oil production, tightens pores, prevents body acne, and maintains skin elasticity.

products.title: Neem Tulsi Soap
products.description: A purifying herbal remedy packed with neem and holy basil (tulsi). Crafted specifically to clarify acne-prone skin and provide a deeply refreshing herbal cleanse.
products.ingredients: Neem Oil, Organic Tulsi Leaves Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Basil Essential Oil, Aloe Vera Extract.
products.benefits: Strong antimicrobial action, fights body odor, controls breakouts, and cools itchy or irritated skin.

products.title: Pure Honey Soap
products.description: A deeply moisturizing bar enriched with wild organic honey and fresh goat milk. Perfect for restoring moisture to dry skin, leaving it incredibly soft and supple.
products.ingredients: Wild Forest Honey, Fresh Goat Milk, Wheatgerm Oil, Olive Oil, Shea Butter.
products.benefits: Deep hydration, locks in natural moisture, repairs skin barriers, and creates a soft, plump texture.

products.title: Coffee Scrub Soap
products.description: Formulated with roasted Arabica coffee grounds and rich cocoa butter. Awakens the skin, improves circulation, and acts as a firming scrub for the entire body.
products.ingredients: Arabica Coffee Grounds, Coffee Seed Extract, Cocoa Butter, Coconut Oil, Vanilla Essential Oil.
products.benefits: Reduces appearance of cellulite, tightens skin, gently scrubs away dead skin, and leaves a rich aroma.

products.title: Body Scrub Soap
products.description: An all-natural exfoliating soap containing crushed apricot seeds and soothing oatmeal. Polishes rough patches on elbows, knees, and heels while keeping skin moisturized.
products.ingredients: Crushed Apricot Seed Powder, Colloidal Oatmeal, Shea Butter, Eucalyptus Essential Oil.
products.benefits: Removes stubborn dirt and dead cells, smooths rough skin texture, and moisturizes deeply.

products.title: Aloe Vera Soap
products.description: Made with pure inner-leaf aloe vera gel to cool, soothe, and nourish. A lightweight, gentle daily bar that is perfect for sensitive skin types.
products.ingredients: Pure Aloe Vera Gel, Vitamin E Oil, Cucumber Extract, Coconut Oil, Grapefruit Seed Extract.
products.benefits: Calms sunburns or rashes, supplies vital skin vitamins, hydrates without oiliness, and soothes sensitive skin.

products.title: Tea Tree Oil Soap
products.description: Infused with therapeutic Australian tea tree oil and French green clay. Helps control excess sebum, clarifies pores, and keeps skin feeling fresh and healthy.
products.ingredients: Tea Tree Essential Oil, Green Clay, Rosemary Extract, Glycerin, Olive Oil.
products.benefits: Regulates oily skin, purifies clogged pores, prevents acne, and provides a fresh cooling sensation.

products.title: Rose Soap
products.description: An elegant, moisturizing bar containing pure Kannauj rosewater and organic rose petals. Tones the skin, boosts hydration, and wraps you in a classic, premium floral aroma.
products.ingredients: Steam-distilled Rosewater, Organic Rose Petals, Coconut Milk, Rose Essential Oil, Shea Butter.
products.benefits: Hydrates and tones, slows skin aging, restores natural pH levels, and leaves a premium aromatherapy scent.

products.title: Lemongrass Soap
products.description: Bursting with refreshing lemongrass essential oil and dried lemon peel. A perfect morning bar that revives tired skin and stimulates the senses.
products.ingredients: Lemongrass Essential Oil, Dried Lemon Peel Powder, Vitamin C, Sweet Almond Oil, Coconut Oil.
products.benefits: Clarifies skin complexion, tightens sagging skin pores, eliminates toxins, and boosts mental energy.

products.title: Red Wine Luxury Soap
products.description: A luxury anti-aging soap infused with organic French red wine extracts and crushed grape seeds. Loaded with natural antioxidants to revive dull, mature skin.
products.ingredients: Red Wine Extract (Resveratrol), Grape Seed Oil, Crushed Grape Seeds, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Cocoa Butter.
products.benefits: Rich in antioxidants, reduces signs of aging, stimulates collagen production, and gives a youthful, radiant complexion.

reviews.title: Absolutely Traditional & Refreshing!
reviews.comment: It feels like my grandmother's homemade ubtan. The scrub texture is perfect, and it leaves my skin glowing. Will buy again!

reviews.title: Great for acne!
reviews.comment: I have been using it for a week on my back acne and it has reduced drastically. The neem smell is strong but very fresh.

reviews.title: Pure Luxury in a Soap!
reviews.comment: The red wine soap is amazing. It does not dry my skin at all, and it has this beautiful burgundy color. Feels very premium.

reviews.title: Excellent morning wakeup scrub
reviews.comment: The coffee aroma is so invigorating. The grounds provide a great scrub. Highly recommend for a refreshing morning bath.

reviews.title: Smells like heaven
reviews.comment: This rose soap is so gentle and smells exactly like fresh roses, not artificial perfume. My skin feels super soft.
